Bash(git commit -m "fix: Add NodeDetailsResponse interface for graph detail panel

Define comprehensive NodeDetailsResponse interface to properly type
the node details API response. This fixes TypeScript compilation error:
''Property summary does not exist on type {}''

- Add NodeDetailsResponse interface with all response fields
- Type the useQuery with NodeDetailsResponse generic
- Cast apiClient.get response to NodeDetailsResponse
- Includes types for objectsGranted, fieldsGranted, summary, etc.

Fixes TypeScript compilation error in Railway build.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: Add collapsible sidebar that expands on hover

Implement space-saving sidebar that shows only icons when collapsed
and expands to show full menu on hover. This provides more screen
real estate for the main content area.

Features:
- Collapses to 64px width (16 tailwind units)
- Expands to 256px width (64 tailwind units) on hover
- Smooth transitions with 300ms duration
- Shows hamburger icon when collapsed, logo when expanded
- Tooltips appear on hover for collapsed menu items
- Icons remain visible in both states
- Navigation labels only show when expanded
- Footer only visible when expanded

UX Improvements:
- More screen space for content
- Smooth animations
- Clear visual feedback
- Maintains full functionality in both states

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")
